name: Required Noise Training for Utah Employers

mainEntity.name: What training must employers provide for noise over 85 dB in Holladay?
mainEntity.text: What training must employers provide for noise over 85 dB in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.text: OSHA-mandated annual training on noise risks, protection use, program purpose, measured by qualified personnel per 29 CFR 1910.95, applicable in Utah.

suggestedAnswer.text: Holladay warehouses require documented sessions covering effects, fitting, care. Inadequate training weakens employer defenses in claims. Workers verify records; gaps support negligence arguments for higher awards. Annual refresh post-STS mandatory.[2]

description: OSHA-mandated annual training on noise risks, protection use, program purpose, measured by qualified personnel per 29 CFR 1910.95, applicable in Utah.
